---
title: "John Duke Pode"
---

## John Duke Pode

**Dates:** (6 Nov 1832-5 Jan 1921)

### Description

first cousin of CMY

### Biography

He married (30 Aug 1860) his cousin Augusta Boevey Crawley (1829/30-1900).

### Letters

- Letter from March 28th [1884] 
- Letter from Decr 21st 1882
- Letter from Novr 8th 1875
- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from Jan 20th [1862]
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
